rows.JPja: スッポンポンだナぁ

rows.TWzh: 這張臉印在我腦海裡了……
rows.JPja: この<Ruby={2:4}かお>顔 <Ruby={2:4}おぼ>覚えちゃったよ…

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>嗯？<unk[5:0]>是你啊。<unk[5:1]>
一大清早的特地来找我搭话，
就这么想跟我聊天吗？
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>嗯？<unk[5:0]>啊，是你呀。<unk[5:1]>
一大早就來搭話，
你這麼想跟我聊天嗎？
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]>んっ？ <unk[5:0]>ああ おめえさんかァ<unk[5:1]>
<Ruby={2:4}あさ>朝っぱらから わざわざ<Ruby={2:4}こえ>声かけてくるたァ
そんなに オラと<Ruby={2:6}はなし>話してェだか？
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>Hm?<unk[5:0]> Oh, it's you... <unk[5:1]>And so early!
Couldn't wait till after lunch to talk to
me again, huh?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>嗯？<unk[5:0]>是你啊。<unk[5:1]>
又来找我搭话了啊，
就这么想跟我聊天吗？
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>嗯？<unk[5:0]>啊，是你呀。<unk[5:1]>
怎麼又來搭話？
你這麼想跟我聊天嗎？
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]>んっ？ <unk[5:0]>ああ おめえさんかァ<unk[5:1]>
また <Ruby={2:4}こえ>声かけてくるたァ
そんなに オラと<Ruby={2:6}はなし>話してェだか？
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>Hm?<unk[5:0]> Oh, it's you...<unk[5:1]>again! Couldn't get
enough of my mellifluous voice, huh?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>嗯？<unk[5:0]>是你啊。<unk[5:1]>
大半夜的特地来找我搭话，
就这么想跟我聊天吗？
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>嗯？<unk[5:0]>啊，是你呀。<unk[5:1]>
這麼晚了還來搭話，
你這麼想跟我聊天嗎？
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]>んっ？ <unk[5:0]>ああ おめえさんかァ<unk[5:1]>
こんな<Ruby={4:4}よふ>夜更けに わざわざ<Ruby={2:4}こえ>声かけてくるたァ
そんなに オラと<Ruby={2:6}はなし>話してェだか？
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>Hm?<unk[5:0]> Oh, it's you!<unk[5:1]> Couldn't wait until
morning to talk to me again, huh?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:0]>我说啊，你知道<Color=red>马神大人<Color=white>吗？<unk[5:1]>
据说他在东北方的东阿卡莱驿站附近哦。
<unk[3:0:268]>听别人说，他能帮忙强化马儿……<unk[5:1]>
我要不要去请他强化一下自己的爱马呢……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:0]>說起來，你知道<Color=red>馬神大人<Color=white>嗎？<unk[5:0]>
祂好像就在東北方的東阿卡萊驛站附近喔。
<unk[3:0:268]>聽說祂能幫人強化馬兒……<unk[5:1]>
我要不要也去拜託祂強化我的愛馬呢？
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:0]>んだばよ <Color=red><Ruby={2:4}うま>馬の<Ruby={4:8}かみさま>神様<Color=white>って<Ruby={2:2}し>知ってるけ？<unk[5:1]>
<Ruby={4:8}ほくとう>北東のヒガッカレ<Ruby={4:8}うまやど>馬宿<Ruby={4:6}ふきん>付近に いるらしいだアよ
<unk[3:0:268]>なんでも <Ruby={2:4}うま>馬を<Ruby={2:4}つよ>強くしてくれるとか…<unk[5:1]>
オラの<Ruby={4:6}あいば>愛馬も お<Ruby={2:4}ねが>願いするかナぁ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:0]>Say, you ever heard of the <Color=red>god of horses<Color=white>?<unk[5:0]>
He's supposed to be near East Akkala
Stable, northeast of here.
<unk[3:0:268]>They say he makes horses stronger...<unk[5:1]> 
Maybe I can ask him to work his magic on
my beloved mare.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>你知道<Color=red>马神大人<Color=white>吗？<unk[5:0]>
据说他在东北方的东阿卡莱驿站附近哦。

<unk[3:0:7]>你知道<Color=red>馬神大人<Color=white>嗎？<unk[5:0]>

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><Color=red><Ruby={2:4}うま>馬の<Ruby={4:8}かみさま>神様<Color=white>って<Ruby={2:2}し>知ってるけ？<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={4:8}ほくとう>北東のヒガッカレ<Ruby={4:8}うまやど>馬宿<Ruby={4:6}ふきん>付近に いるらしいだアよ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>Ever heard of the <Color=red>god of horses<Color=white>?<unk[5:0]>
He's supposed to be near East Akkala
Stable, northeast of here.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:12]>据说在这附近住着一位<Color=red>马神大人<Color=white>，
好像还是个贪吃鬼呢……
<unk[3:0:263]>如果带些美味的料理给他，
他会不会高兴呢？
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:12]>我聽說這附近有位<Color=red>馬神大人<Color=white>，
祂似乎是個貪吃鬼喔……
<unk[3:0:263]>如果製作美味料理帶去給祂，
祂會感到高興嗎？
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:12]>この<Ruby={2:4}ちか>近くに <Color=red><Ruby={2:4}うま>馬の<Ruby={4:8}かみさま>神様<Color=white>がいるって<Ruby={2:2}き>聞いただアよ
なんでも とっても<Ruby={2:2}く>食いしん<Ruby={2:4}ぼう>坊らしい…

<Ruby={2:6}よろこ>喜ぶかナ？
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:12]>I hear the <Color=red>god of horses<Color=white> is around here.
He's a big eater, or so they say.

<unk[3:0:263]>Guess I'd better whip up a meal for him
before I drop by.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>据说在这附近住着一位<Color=red>马神大人<Color=white>，
好像还是个贪吃鬼呢……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>我聽說這附近有位<Color=red>馬神大人<Color=white>，

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]>この<Ruby={2:4}ちか>近くに <Color=red><Ruby={2:4}うま>馬の<Ruby={4:8}かみさま>神様<Color=white>がいるって<Ruby={2:2}き>聞いただアよ
なんでも とっても<Ruby={2:2}く>食いしん<Ruby={2:4}ぼう>坊らしい…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>I hear the <Color=red>god of horses<Color=white> is around here.
He's a big eater, or so they say.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:12]>要是我的爱马的力量再强一点，
就能带一大堆行李行商了。
<unk[3:0:263]>据说只要请求那个<Color=red>马神大人<Color=white>，
他就会帮忙强化马儿，我要不要去试试呢？
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:12]>如果我的愛馬力氣能再大一點，
就能載更多行李來行商了。
<unk[3:0:263]>聽說只要拜託<Color=red>馬神大人<Color=white>，祂就會幫忙強化馬兒，
我要不要也去試試呢？
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:12]>オラの<Ruby={4:6}あいば>愛馬が もうちょっと<Ruby={4:8}ちからも>力持ちだったら
いっぱい<Ruby={4:6}にもつ>荷物を<Ruby={2:2}つ>積んで <Ruby={4:12}ぎょうしょう>行商できるんだがナぁ
<unk[3:0:263]><Color=red><Ruby={2:4}うま>馬の<Ruby={4:8}かみさま>神様<Color=white>ってのにお<Ruby={2:4}ねが>願いしたら
<Ruby={2:4}うま>馬を<Ruby={2:4}つよ>強くしてくれるって<Ruby={2:6}うわさ>噂だ <Ruby={2:2}い>行ってみるかナ？
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:12]>I love my mare, but a heavyweight hauler
she is not. If the girl had more muscle,
I could load more onto my wagon.
<unk[3:0:263]>The <Color=red>god of horses<Color=white> can make steeds
stronger, they say... Maybe I'll try paying
him a visit.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>据说只要请求那个<Color=red>马神大人<Color=white>，
他就会帮忙强化马儿，我要不要去试试呢？
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>聽說只要拜託<Color=red>馬神大人<Color=white>，祂就會幫忙強化馬兒，
我要不要也去試試呢？
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><Color=red><Ruby={2:4}うま>馬の<Ruby={4:8}かみさま>神様<Color=white>ってのにお<Ruby={2:4}ねが>願いしたら
<Ruby={2:4}うま>馬を<Ruby={2:4}つよ>強くしてくれるって<Ruby={2:6}うわさ>噂だ <Ruby={2:2}い>行ってみるかナ？
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>The <Color=red>god of horses<Color=white> can make steeds
stronger, they say... Maybe I'll try paying
him a visit.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>马儿是行商时重要的同伴。<unk[5:0]>
工作一天以后，我就会好好慰劳它。
<unk[3:0:264]>我的爱马最喜欢吃的就是毅力胡萝卜。

据说<Color=red>马神大人<Color=white>就在这附近，
他会不会也喜欢吃胡萝卜呢？
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>馬兒是行商時重要的同伴。<unk[5:0]>
若讓牠工作了一整天，就得給予相應的獎勵。
<unk[3:0:264]>我的愛馬最喜歡毅力胡蘿蔔了。

我聽說這附近有位<Color=red>馬神大人<Color=white>，
不曉得祂是不是也喜歡胡蘿蔔？
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><Ruby={4:12}ぎょうしょう>行商をするのに <Ruby={2:4}うま>馬は<Ruby={4:8}たいせつ>大切な<Ruby={4:6}なかま>仲間なんだナぁ<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={6:14}いちにちはたら>一日働いたら ご<Ruby={4:6}ほうび>褒美をあげるのよ
<unk[3:0:264]>オラの<Ruby={4:6}あいば>愛馬は ガッツニンジンが<Ruby={6:12}だいこうぶつ>大好物だアよ

この<Ruby={2:4}ちか>近くにいるっていう<Color=red><Ruby={2:4}うま>馬の<Ruby={4:8}かみさま>神様<Color=white>も
ニンジン<Ruby={2:2}す>好きなのかナぁ？
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>A horse is every merchant's best friend.<unk[5:0]>
That's why I reward my dear mare after a
hard day's work.
<unk[3:0:264]>She just loves endura carrots. Can't get
enough of 'em.

That <Color=red>god of horses <Color=white>who's supposed to be
nearby... I wonder if he eats them too.
He's a horse himself, right? Or no?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>我的爱马最喜欢吃的就是毅力胡萝卜。
<Color=red>马神大人<Color=white>会不会也喜欢吃胡萝卜呢？
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>我的愛馬最喜歡毅力胡蘿蔔了，
不曉得<Color=red>馬神大人<Color=white>是不是也喜歡胡蘿蔔？
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]>オラの<Ruby={4:6}あいば>愛馬は ガッツニンジンが<Ruby={4:6}だいす>大好きだアよ
<Color=red><Ruby={2:4}うま>馬の<Ruby={4:8}かみさま>神様<Color=white>も ニンジン<Ruby={2:2}す>好きかナぁ？
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>That <Color=red>god of horses <Color=white>nearby... Do you think
he likes endura carrots as much as my
darling mare?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>我的爱马是个慢性子，
要是它能走得快一点就好了……
要不要请<Color=red>马神大人<Color=white>让它变得快点呢？
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>我的愛馬腳程有點慢，
如果牠能走得更快一點那就好了。
要不要請<Color=red>馬神大人<Color=white>將牠的腳程變得更快呢？
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]>オラの<Ruby={4:6}あいば>愛馬は ゆっくりさんだ
もっと<Ruby={2:4}はや>速く<Ruby={2:4}ある>歩いてくれたら <Ruby={2:4}うれ>嬉しいんだけどナぁ
<Color=red><Ruby={2:4}うま>馬の<Ruby={4:8}かみさま>神様<Color=white>に <Ruby={4:8}あしはや>脚速くしてもらうかナぁ？
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>I love my horse, but she's not what you'd
call "fast."

You think the <Color=red>god of horses <Color=white>could make
her run a little quicker?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>我的爱马是个慢性子，
要不要请<Color=red>马神大人<Color=white>让它变得快点呢？
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>我的愛馬腳程有點慢，
要不要請<Color=red>馬神大人<Color=white>將牠的腳程變得更快呢？
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]>オラの<Ruby={4:6}あいば>愛馬は ゆっくりさんだ
<Color=red><Ruby={2:4}うま>馬の<Ruby={4:8}かみさま>神様<Color=white>に <Ruby={4:8}あしはや>脚速くしてもらうかナぁ？
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>My mare, bless her, likes to take it slow.
Think the <Color=red>god of horses<Color=white> could make her
run a little quicker?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>据说附近的海边有<Color=red>海盗<Color=white>出没，
世道真不太平啊……
<unk[3:0:266]>怪物一多，旅行者就少了，
生意也没法儿做了。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>聽說最近附近的海域有<Color=red>海盜<Color=white>出沒，
真是不安穩的世道啊。
<unk[3:0:266]>一旦怪物增加，旅行者就會隨之減少，
這樣我就做不成生意啦。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><Ruby={4:8}さいきん>最近 <Ruby={2:4}ちか>近くの<Ruby={2:4}うみ>海に <Color=red><Ruby={4:8}かいぞく>海賊<Color=white>が<Ruby={4:10}しゅつぼつ>出没するらしいだアよ
<Ruby={4:8}ぶっそう>物騒な<Ruby={2:2}よ>世の<Ruby={2:4}なか>中だナ
<unk[3:0:266]><Ruby={4:6}まもの>魔物が<Ruby={2:2}ふ>増えると <Ruby={4:8}たびびと>旅人が<Ruby={2:2}へ>減るけぇ
<Ruby={4:10}しょうばい>商売あがったりなんだナ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>I hear <Color=red>pirates<Color=white> have been appearing on the
waters near here. It's a dangerous place,
this world we live in.
<unk[3:0:266]>Folks will probably avoid this area, which
is bad news for my balance sheet.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:10]>据说附近的海域有<Color=red>海盗<Color=white>出没，
世道真不太平啊……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:10]>聽說最近附近的海域有<Color=red>海盜<Color=white>出沒，
真是不安穩的世道啊。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:10]><Ruby={4:8}さいきん>最近 <Ruby={2:4}ちか>近くの<Ruby={2:4}うみ>海に <Color=red><Ruby={4:8}かいぞく>海賊<Color=white>が<Ruby={4:10}しゅつぼつ>出没するらしいだアよ
<Ruby={4:8}ぶっそう>物騒な<Ruby={2:2}よ>世の<Ruby={2:4}なか>中だナ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:10]>I hear <Color=red>pirates<Color=white> have been appearing on the
waters near here. This world can be a
scary place sometimes.

rows.JPja: <Ruby={4:6}あいば>愛馬を…
<Ruby={2:2}く>食いしん<Ruby={2:4}ぼう>坊かァ…
<Ruby={4:10}しょうばい>商売あがったりだァ
<Ruby={2:2}う>売り<Ruby={2:4}もの>物が<Ruby={2:2}ぬ>濡れちまう
こわい こわい…
<Ruby={2:4}うま>馬の<Ruby={4:8}かみさま>神様…
ニンジン…
ゆっくりだナぁ
rows.USen: Pick it up, girl! Come on!

rows.JPja: <Ruby={4:8}ぶっそう>物騒だナ

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>嗯？<unk[5:0]>是你啊。<unk[5:1]>
天气这么差，还特地来找我搭话，
就这么想跟我聊天吗？
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>嗯？<unk[5:0]>啊，是你呀。<unk[5:1]>
天氣這麼差還來搭話，
你這麼想跟我聊天嗎？
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]>んっ？ <unk[5:0]>ああ おめえさんかァ<unk[5:1]>
こんな<Ruby={4:6}てんき>天気の<Ruby={2:4}なか>中 わざわざ<Ruby={2:4}こえ>声かけてくるたァ
そんなに オラと<Ruby={2:6}はなし>話してェだか？
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>Hm?<unk[5:0]> Oh, it's you!<unk[5:1]> So you trudged through
the rain just to talk to me again?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:4]>好了！<unk[5:1]>
先不说这些了，还是谈生意吧！
<unk[3:0:8]>有没有什么想买的，想卖的？
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:4]>好啦！<unk[5:1]>
先不說這些，趕快回到正題來談生意吧！
<unk[3:0:8]>你想買什麼，
或者想賣什麼東西嗎？
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:4]>だば！<unk[5:1]>
それよりも せっかく<Ruby={6:14}しょうばいはじ>商売始めたんダ
<unk[3:0:8]><Ruby={2:4}なに>何か<Ruby={2:2}か>買いたいもんとか
<Ruby={2:2}う>売りたいもんとかないのけ？
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:4]>Anyway!<unk[5:0]> More importantly. I'm open
for business.

<unk[3:0:8]>You want to buy or sell anything?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:12]>要是下起雨来，
我就做不成生意了。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:12]>只要一下雨
就做不了生意啦。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:12]><Ruby={2:4}あめ>雨さ<Ruby={2:2}ふ>降ってしまうと
<Ruby={4:10}しょうばい>商売あがったりだアよ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:12]>Rain... It keeps my customers indoors,
exactly where I don't want 'em.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:0]>话说回来了，不管怎样……

<unk[3:0:8]>能像现在这样骑着马儿做生意，
听各种人讲各种事儿，就很开心了。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:0]>說起來，雖然發生了很多事……

<unk[3:0:8]>但這樣跟馬兒一起到處做買賣，
聽聞各地的故事也滿開心的。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:0]>んだば <Ruby={4:8}いろいろ>色々あっけど…

<unk[3:0:8]>こうやって<Ruby={2:4}うま>馬に<Ruby={2:2}の>乗って <Ruby={4:10}しょうばい>商売やってっと
<Ruby={2:4}いろ>色んな<Ruby={2:6}はなし>話を<Ruby={2:2}き>聞けて <Ruby={2:4}たの>楽しいだァね
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:0]>You know, my favorite part of this job
is all the people I meet.

<unk[3:0:8]>It's always fun hearing folks' stories!<unk[5:0]>

rows.JPja: <unk[3:0:7]><Ruby={2:4}ほか>他に<Ruby={2:4}なに>何か <Ruby={2:4}よう>用はあるだか？
<Ruby={2:2}か>買う
<Ruby={2:2}う>売る

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:5]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>It's...it's finally mine! The <Color=red>towing harness<Color=white>
of my dreams!

Took a while to save up enough<Color=red> Pony
Points<Color=white> for it. So many wild horses
registered, so many nights at stables...
But it's all been worth it! Now that I've
got this harness, I can tow to my heart's
content!

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]>I totally get it!<PageBreak>I mean, if you had a <Color=red>harness<Color=white> of your own,
<Color=red>your horse could pull a wagon<Color=white> or all kinds
of other stuff.
Doing business from a wagon's always
been a dream of mine, me being a
merchant and all.
<unk[3:0:7]>I trade around <Color=red>Akkala<Color=white>, to the northeast,
so if you ever pass me on the road,
definitely give me a shout!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>你对我的<Color=red>牵引挽具<Color=white>
就这么感兴趣吗？
那你也多去几次驿站，
攒攒<Color=red>点数<Color=white>好了。
寄放新的野生马匹也行，住宿也行，
使用驿站提供的服务就能攒到。
<unk[3:0:8]>只要有了挽具，
就能让马拉搬运车，百利而无一害！
我准备用这挽具和搬运车
去这里东北方的<Color=red>阿卡莱地区<Color=white>做生意，
你要是在附近，记得来找我哦～
哎呀～走在路上肯定还会再碰面的。

我要利用這個挽具和搬運車，

如果有到那附近的話記得來找我～

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>Like my <Color=red>towing harness<Color=white> that much, do ya?<PageBreak>Then you gotta hit the stables and build
up some <Color=red>Pony Points<Color=white> of your own!<PageBreak>You can earn points by using the stable
facilities, handing 'em new wild horses,
and staying the night there.
<unk[3:0:8]>Build up enough points and you'll get
your own harness. Then you can pull a
wagon all day long!
I do my trading northeast of here in
<Color=red>Akkala<Color=white>, so come find me if you're nearby.<PageBreak>And hey, spend enough time on the road
and I'm sure we'll see each other again!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:10]>可是，竟然在这个值得庆贺的日子下起了雨，
真是不走运啊……
<unk[3:0:5]>……不过，从雨水能冲刷掉污垢的角度来想，
其实我还是很幸运的……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:10]>真不走運，居然在這時候下雨，
今天可是我值得記念的日子啊……
<unk[3:0:5]>……不，只要想成這場雨幫忙沖洗髒汙，
說不定可以算是走運吧……

<unk[3:0:5]>…いや <Ruby={2:4}よご>汚れを<Ruby={2:4}あら>洗い<Ruby={2:4}なが>流してくれると<Ruby={2:4}おも>思えば
<Ruby={2:6}ぎゃく>逆に ツイてるかもしれねぇナ…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:10]>The only thing putting a damper on my
wonderful day is this darned rain.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:5]>Then again, if it's washing away all this
muck, maybe it's a good thing...
